ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop being analyzed */,
  "variable_cost" REAL /* Total variable costs per hectare */,
  "fixed_cost" REAL /* Total fixed costs per hectare */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total production costs per hectare */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for costs */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of production */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_costs_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_costs_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of the crop (e.g., cereal, vegetable) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the crop is grown */,
  "average_yield" REAL /* Average yield per hectare */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Average market price per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_costs" (
  "variable_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable cost record */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of variable cost (e.g., Human Labour, Bullock Labour) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., Day, Hour) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the variable cost incurred */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per unit of the variable cost */,
  "value" REAL /* Total value of the variable cost */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_costs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixed_costs" (
  "fixed_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixed cost record */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of fixed cost (e.g., Land Rental, Equipment Purchase) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount for the fixed cost */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment related to the fixed cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixed_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixed_costs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "farmer_name" TEXT /* Name of the farmer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the farmer */,
  "farm_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the farmer's farm */,
  "area_under_cultivation" REAL /* Total area under cultivation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment record */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., tractor, plow) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of equipment purchase */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop the budget is associated with */,
  "expected_revenue" REAL /* Expected revenue from the crop */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for producing the crop */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Calculated profit margin for the crop */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer who created the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop sold */,
  "quantity_sold" REAL /* Quantity of crop sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price per unit of crop */,
  "total_sale_value" REAL /* Total sale value from the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonal variation record */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the variation occurs */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact the variation has on production */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the seasonal variation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the seasonal variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profitability_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profitability analysis record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop being analyzed */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit calculated for the crop */,
  "cost_analysis" TEXT /* Analysis summary of costs associated with the crop */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer who created the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profitability_analysis_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profitability_analysis_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_income" REAL /* Total income for the crop over the reporting period */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total expenditure for the crop over the reporting period */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_yield" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of production */,
  "yield_per_hectare" REAL /* Actual yield per hectare */,
  "total_yield" REAL /* Total yield */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yield_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yield_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location for which the weather data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature on the recorded date */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall on the recorded date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_data" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil record */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location for which the soil data is recorded */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil (e.g., clay, loam) */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  "nutrient_level" REAL /* Nutrient level of the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop affected */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the disease */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_diseases_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pests" (
  "pest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pest record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop affected */,
  "pest_name" TEXT /* Name of the pest */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the pest infestation */,
  "control_measures" TEXT /* Control measures for the pest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pests_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)
